title: Days after President Trump celebrated ousting incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s GOP primary, Cassidy voted in favor of advancing a resolution that would limit Trump’s ability to wage war in Iran without congressional approval

A Georgia congressman and a former college football coach will meet in a runoff next month after neither captured 50% of the vote in the GOP Senate primary Tuesday to challenge Democrat Jon Ossoff for his Senate seat
President Trump’s handpicked House candidate defeated longtime GOP antagonist Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky, underscoring the president’s iron grip on the Republican Party

Fed officials all but retired the question that had dominated their debates for the past two years—whether to cut interest rates—and began at their April meeting to more seriously weigh whether to raise them
Xi calls for end to Middle East hostilities, strengthens Russia trade deals as Putin visits China
James Murdoch to Buy New York Magazine, Other Vox Assets for Around $300 Million

WHO says risk of Ebola outbreak spreading globally is low, but high at regional levels as cases expected to rise
